purpose: Setting-diverse Chloe LoRA v0.2 reference candidates generated through the local ComfyUI API runner.

items.caption: photo of chloe_katastrophe_v1, adult woman, gothic cemetery environmental portrait, dark wavy hair, gray-green eyes, fair textured skin with light freckles, subtle Slavic facial structure, black wool coat, weathered headstones, overcast natural light, quiet observant expression
items.review_notes: Identity holds under cemetery setting pressure. Side-angle gaze is useful for diversity but not direct-gaze canon.
